data.body: 10/12 tickets closed. e205 + 0435 completion-verifier caught REAL gaps: e205 missed 'bash collector' step name (my grep didn't cover it); 0435's quickstart gate used editable install + probe-rebar.sh not wired. Fixes (2 follow-up commits on docs-remediation-followup): (1) e205: dropped 'bash collector' from step name in test.yml+gerrit-verify. (2) 0435: added a golden-path job to both workflows doing 'pip install .' (clean wheel) + check_readme_quickstart.py, wired into gerrit vote.needs. Probe-rebar.sh found to have pre-existing rot (TTY-only auto-init + 10 stale assertions) -> filed bug slushy-commonlaw-drongo (6cca) discovered_from 0435; reconciled 0435 T7 AC to use check_readme_quickstart.py (the ticket's permitted trimmed subset) + track probe rot. Rebasing + pushing follow-ups to Gerrit.
